task_statuses.qa_evidence: Static and reels_promotion audits verify in-page creator, action stack, owner controls.
task_statuses.known_limitations: Browser audio audibility still depends on browser autoplay/user gesture rules.

task_statuses.qa_evidence: Owner edit and non-owner 403 are verified by reels_promotion_audit.
Audit creates real shared Reel and verifies same track URL plus original_audio_muted in feed and Reel payloads.
Completion audit verifies observer, muted first-10-second loop, and image/text animation hooks.
Render order check verifies owner header before caption/media and comment composer last.
Authenticated browser QA and route checks loaded desktop/mobile with no old alert bang links.
Owner draft promotion, non-owner blocks, safe unavailable forecasting and analytics verified.
task_statuses.known_limitations: Launch remains billing-gated until funding/provider readiness.

task_statuses.qa_evidence: Push audit verifies login-style notification writes queue durable jobs in same transaction without enqueue failure.
task_statuses.known_limitations: Provider delivery still requires configured subscriptions/provider credentials.
